title: alpinia orientalis
intro: Alpinia orientalis, also known as the Lesser Galangal, is a tropical plant species belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alpinia orientalis include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting respiratory health. Alpinia orientalis is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or extract, which can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
